description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that triggers on push events to main and stage-workflows branches, specifically for kmk/** and .github/workflows/compile.yml files. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-24.04 environment with a matrix strategy for different mpy-cross releases. It checks out the repository, caches or installs mpy-cross, compiles the code, lists the build directory, and uploads the compiled artifact as a zip file.
